reason: Frontend task entry point and checklist for Vue/Vite conventions.
Settings and Git panel UI changes must follow local component conventions.
AI preferences and mode configuration are persisted through Pinia/bridge state.
AI provider/mode data model changes require shared TypeScript type updates.
General frontend quality rules for focused, maintainable changes.
preload bridge AI calls need consistent user-visible error handling.
AI API key handling and bridge behavior must avoid leaking secrets.
UX research for AI provider configuration, model testing, and mode management.
